name: firebase-chat-example
description: AI Chat example — Tuplet agent with Firestore + React UI

scripts.setup: pnpm install && cd server && pnpm install && cd ../client && pnpm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n emulator,server,client -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm dev:emulator" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8080 && cd server && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:client: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && cd client && pnpm run dev
